name: check-build
description: Stop hook: runs build check on changed files, auto-commits on green, blocks on red

hooks.command: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[check-hook] uv is not installed. See https://docs.astral.sh/uv/getting-started/installation/' >&2; exit 0; }; uv run --script ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/check-hook.py
